evals.prompt: Write a script that updates a 'spawnPos' vector parameter in a VFX component based on where the user pinches in the world.
evals.expected_output: A script using vfxComponent.asset.properties to pass a vec3 into the graph.
expectations: Uses vec3 for the position data
Logic triggered by a SIK Pinch or GestureModule event

evals.prompt: Create a logic that ramps up a VFX float parameter called 'Intensity' from 0 to 1 over 2 seconds when an event fires.
evals.expected_output: An interpolation loop updating a VFX asset property over time.
expectations: Uses an UpdateEvent for the ramp-up
Calculates alpha based on elapsed time
